Two-token Model

Build on Dinero

pxETH

pxETH is DeFi’s highest yielding Ethereum liquid staking solution.

Branded LSTs

pxETH allows L1s and L2s to build their own LSTs using Dinero’s infrastructure.

Security

pxETH is

Everywhere

Curve

Provide pxETH/WETH liquidity on Curve to earn CRV rewards and liquidity provider fees.

Aura

Stake pxETH/WETH Balancer liquidity with Aura to earn AURA rewards.

Balancer

Provide pxETH/WETH liquidity on Balancer to earn BAL rewards and liquidity provider fees.

Convex

Stake pxETH/WETH Curve liquidity with Convex to earn CVX rewards.

PancakeSwap

Provide pxETH/WETH liquidity on PancakeSwap to earn CAKE rewards and liquidity provider fees.

Morpho

Borrow against apxETH to earn leveraged staking yield.

Pendle

Go long apxETH yield or earn fixed apxETH yield using Pendle.

Velodrome

Provide pxETH/WETH liquidity on Velodrome using the Optimism L2 to earn VELO rewards and liquidity provider fees.

Dinero

The DINERO governance token.

All aspects of the Dinero protocol are decided on by the DAO. DINERO holders can stake their tokens to have a say in these decisions and to earn rewards.
